text.title: RAG Corpus Discovery Interview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the corpus-discovery-report artefact + valid/invalid examples.

list.item: guide prompt with leading phrasing ("would you", "do you think you would") (rule r2)
finding labelled `finding` with single-interview evidence (rule r1+r4)

example.code: { "artefact_id": "corpus-discovery-support-bot-2026q2", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "guide_prompts": [ "Walk me through the last time you looked up a customer policy.", "Show me where the answer actually lives in your tools today.", "Tell me about a time the answer was wrong or stale.", "Describe how you decide which source to trust.", "Which document classes are licensed for embedding?" ], "interviews": [ {"transcript_id": "t1", "recording_url": "s3://faion-research/2026q2/t1.m4a", "consent_recorded": true, "interviewee_role": "support-lead"}, {"transcript_id": "t2", "recording_url": "s3://faion-research/2026q2/t2.m4a", "consent_recorded": true, "interviewee_role": "policy-author"}, {"transcript_id": "t3", "recording_url": "s3://faion-research/2026q2/t3.m4a", "consent_recorded": true, "interviewee_role": "support-lead"}, {"transcript_id": "t4", "recording_url": "s3://faion-research/2026q2/t4.m4a", "consent_recorded": true, "interviewee_role": "knowledge-mgr"}, {"transcript_id": "t5", "recording_url": "s3://faion-research/2026q2/t5.m4a", "consent_recorded": true, "interviewee_role": "legal-counsel"} ], "quotes": [ {"transcript_id": "t1", "timestamp": "00:08:42", "text": "I always check the Confluence policy first, then Slack #policy."}, {"transcript_id": "t2", "timestamp": "00:12:10", "text": "Half the FAQ entries haven't been updated in two years."}, {"transcript_id": "t3", "timestamp": "00:05:18", "text": "Confluence is the authoritative source, but I cross-check Slack."}, {"transcript_id": "t4", "timestamp": "00:21:33", "text": "Customer contracts are not licensed for indexing."}, {"transcript_id": "t5", "timestamp": "00:14:07", "text": "GDPR class C data cannot be embedded outside EU region."} ], "findings": [ {"id": "f1", "label": "finding", "evidence_quote_ids": ["t1@00:08:42", "t3@00:05:18"]}, {"id": "f2", "label": "hypothesis", "evidence_quote_ids": ["t2@00:12:10"]} ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-22" }

example.note: guide leading (f3); interviews <5 (f1); consent_recorded=false (f2); quotes/findings empty.
